seoTitle: Melaleuca vs Melville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Melaleuca and Melville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Melaleuca and Melville.
heading: Melaleuca vs Melville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Melaleuca, Western Australia and Melville, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Melville has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Melaleuca (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Melaleuca or Melville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Melaleuca has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Melville scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Melaleuca scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Melville scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Melaleuca or Melville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Melville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
